  • Uses of EMediplanType in org.projecthusky.fhir.emed.ch.epr.model.emediplan

    Methods in org.projecthusky.fhir.emed.ch.epr.model.emediplan that return EMediplanType
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    abstract @Nullable EMediplanType
    EMediplan.getType()
     
    abstract EMediplanType
    EMediplan.resolveType()
    Resolves the eMediplan type, which can be missing for ChMed23A eMediplan objects authored by a patient, because a Medication Plan is assumed (since they are not allowed to author prescriptions).
    static EMediplanType
    EMediplanType.valueOf(String name)
    Returns the enum constant of this class with the specified name.
    static EMediplanType[]
    EMediplanType.values()
    Returns an array containing the constants of this enum class, in the order they are declared.
    Methods in org.projecthusky.fhir.emed.ch.epr.model.emediplan with parameters of type EMediplanType
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    ValidationResult
    EMediplanHealthcarePerson.validate(@Nullable String basePath, EMediplanType mediplanType)
     
    ValidationResult
    EMediplanMedicament.validate(@Nullable String basePath, EMediplanType mediplanType)
    Context-aware validation, that takes into account whether the eMediplan document is a treatment plan or a prescription.
    ValidationResult
    EMediplanPatient.validate(@Nullable String basePath, EMediplanType mediplanType, Instant timestamp)
    Validates the patient object taking into account which type of eMediplan document it belongs to.

  • Uses of EMediplanType in org.projecthusky.fhir.emed.ch.epr.model.emediplan.chmed16a.posology

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    ValidationResult
    ChMed16APosology.validate(@Nullable String basePath, EMediplanType mediplanType)
    Performs validation of the eMediplan object taking into account whether it belongs to an eMediplan medication plan document or to an eMediplan prescription document.

    protected M
    ChMed16ABaseConverter.toMedicament(ChEmedEprMedication medication, ChEmedEprDosage baseDosage, List<@NonNull ChEmedEprDosage> additionalDosages, @Nullable String treatmentReason, Author medicalAuthor, SubstanceAdministrationSubstitutionCode substitutionCode, @Nullable org.hl7.fhir.r4.model.MedicationRequest.MedicationRequestDispenseRequestComponent dispenseRequest, EMediplanType mediplanType)

    EPrescriptionConverter.toMedicament(ChEmedEprMedication medication, ChEmedEprDosage baseDosage, List<@NonNull ChEmedEprDosage> additionalDosages, @Nullable String treatmentReason, Author medicalAuthor, SubstanceAdministrationSubstitutionCode substitutionCode, @Nullable org.hl7.fhir.r4.model.MedicationRequest.MedicationRequestDispenseRequestComponent dispenseRequest, EMediplanType mediplanType)
     
    @Nullable ChMed16APosology
    ChMed16ABaseConverter.toPosology(ChEmedEprDosage baseDosage, List<@NonNull ChEmedEprDosage> additionalDosages, ChMed16AMedicament medicament, EMediplanType mediplanType)
    Converts the list of Dosage objects of a CH EMED EPR resource (either medication statement or medication request) to an ChMed16APosology object.
